name: lizhangmai
description: Reusable agent skills maintained by lizhangmai, including Monata simulation environment setup and local conda-channel build workflows.

plugins.name: monata-env
plugins.description: Set up global Monata circuit-tool dependencies with pixi global, a local circuit-tool conda channel, and direct tool smoke tests.

plugins.name: conda-build
plugins.description: Manage local self-use conda channels and conda package supply-chain workflows with rattler-build, including the bundled circuit-toolchain recipe set.

plugins.name: monata-techlib
plugins.description: Bootstrap official PTM Monata techlibs under MONATA_HOME, preserve third-party notices, and support local private/offline techlib installs.
